components.marketing_strategy: Hybrid Rule: Pure HTML+Tailwind for complex overlapping layouts, heavily customized Shadcn for interactives (Forms, Carousel).

hero_background.description: Red digital abstract light, used for hero section background with overlay.

services_portfolio_abstract_1.description: Futuristic red geometric 3D shape, used for product dev or portfolio grid.

services_portfolio_abstract_2.description: Red and black round overlapping elements, ideal for case studies.

team_about.description: Dark tech environment/screen, used for team/about section background or visual.

industries_abstract.description: Red LED geometric lines, used for Industries section backgrounds.

design_rules: Use Optical Glassmorphism for header: bg-[#150708]/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-red-500/10.
Hero text MUST use bg-clip-text text-transparent bg-gradient-to-r from-red-500 to-orange-500 on the words 'Expert IT Consulting'.
Never use pure black (#000000); always use #150708 (dark maroon tint).
All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.
Do NOT use generic Shadcn Card component everywhere. Use Grid Borders (border-r border-b border-red-500/10) for services.
Marquee for tech stack MUST use 'react-icons/si' (e.g., SiSap, SiAws, SiReact, SiDocker, SiOracle) with muted coloring and hover:text-red-500.
Images MUST have max-h-[80vh] md:max-h-none on mobile.
Buttons: Use flat design with sharp or slight rounded corners (rounded-sm). Primary button bg-red-500 hover:bg-orange-500 text-white.
Forms: Use Shadcn form components customized with #1F0B0E backgrounds and red rings on focus.
Hero image overlay MUST NOT exceed bg-[#150708]/60 to keep the image visible.
Section Headings MUST be left-aligned for clear hierarchy, except in explicitly centered sections like Testimonials.

pages_and_sections.name: Header
pages_and_sections.description: Sticky top nav with Logo (text or abstract mark), Links, and a Contact CTA. Glassmorphism effect.

pages_and_sections.name: Hero
pages_and_sections.description: Bold headline with red->orange gradient text. Dual CTA (Explore Services [Primary], Learn More [Outline]). Background image with heavy overlay.

pages_and_sections.name: Tech Stack Marquee
pages_and_sections.description: Continuous scrolling row of technology logos (SAP, AWS, React, etc.) using react-fast-marquee and react-icons.

pages_and_sections.name: Services
pages_and_sections.description: Grid borders layout covering: IT Consulting, Software Development, Product Development, Cloud & DevOps, Data & Analytics, SAP HCM/HANA.

pages_and_sections.name: Industries
pages_and_sections.description: Showcasing Finance, Healthcare, Retail, etc., utilizing the red LED geometric image.

pages_and_sections.name: Process
pages_and_sections.description: Discover -> Design -> Build -> Deploy -> Support timeline with vertical or horizontal lines.

pages_and_sections.name: Case Studies / Portfolio
pages_and_sections.description: Bento grid mode A. Using the abstract geometric 3D images to make it look premium and tech-focused.

pages_and_sections.name: Team & About
pages_and_sections.description: Dark atmospheric section with the team/about image. Text overlapping or side-by-side.

pages_and_sections.name: Contact / CTA
pages_and_sections.description: Static visual form with dark maroon background, red outline inputs.

pages_and_sections.name: Footer
pages_and_sections.description: Dark footer section with site map, social links, and a large text-based logo representation.
